name: Content Creation and Publishing Workflow
description: Automated content pipeline from brief intake through AI drafting, editorial review, SEO optimization, and multi-channel publishing.
author: Murphy System

nodes.label: Content Brief Intake
nodes.description: Accepts content briefs via form, API, or scheduled calendar events.

nodes.label: AI Content Drafter
nodes.description: Generates a full draft using the brief context, tone guidelines, and target audience.

nodes.label: SEO Optimizer
nodes.description: Enhances draft with target keywords, meta description, and readability scoring.

nodes.label: Multi-Channel Publisher
nodes.description: Publishes approved content to configured channels: blog, LinkedIn, Twitter, newsletter.
